title: Insanity
description: Are you ready to dive into the chaos?
body:
# Welcome to Insanity
Immerse yourself in a chilling, psychological horror experience. Brace yourself for mind-bending twists and intense survival challenges. Your sanity will be tested as eerie whispers and unsettling visions blur the line between reality and nightmare. Can you keep your wits about you and survive the insanity? Remember, they're always lurking in the shadows, waiting to consume you. Keep calm and stay vigilant—they're in your mind, and they're out to get you.
